reason: Complete map of the current experiment backend/frontend being refactored: artifact shapes per stage, auto-loop, action endpoints, page anatomy, i18n keys, tests
Reference interaction model being ported: stage machine, per-stage user actions, LiveRunButton/DiffView contracts, job-progress pattern, verdict/promote semantics
First-hand UX observations of the deployed reference incl. zh-CN wording for buttons/hints and card layout details
Eval-supported agent methods + telemetry/service-name resolution rules the experiment flow must respect (runtime log groups, method gating)
Dataset kinds (legacy/predefined/simulated) and item shapes — the traffic stage dataset picker builds on these
